title: Delhi High Court seeks ED, Centre reply in plea to read down PMLA provision on property attachment
description: The Delhi High Court on Thursday issued notice to the Central government and the Directorate of Enforcement (ED) on a plea seeking the reading down of the Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA) provisions dealing with the attachment of properties involved in money laundering. A Bench of Chief Justice Devendra Kumar Upadhyaya and Justice Tejas Karia directed the ED and the government to reply in four weeks to the plea filed by Sachin Dev Duggal, a UK-based entrepreneur involved in the ED’
